summary: Tested Phase 1 AI Features: AI Trade Coach, AI Financial Summary, AI Balance Forecast, and AI Forum Summary. All 15 backend tests PASSED. All 4 AI endpoints are working correctly with OpenRouter gpt-4o-mini integration and MongoDB caching. UI components verified on Trade Monitor, Profit Tracker, and Forum pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 AI features all working. AI Cache uses MongoDB 'ai_cache' collection with different TTLs per feature (trade_coach: 1hr, financial_summary: 24hr, balance_forecast: 12hr, post_summarizer: 2hr). OpenRouter API key in OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var. Forum AI Summary only shows button when post has 3+ comments.

ai_trade_coach.description: Returns personalized coaching feedback for a trade
ai_trade_coach.ui_location: Trade Monitor > Trade History table > expandable 'AI Coach' button under each trade row
ai_trade_coach.example_response: It looks like you've had a rough patch with your recent BUY trades, especially with the last two being significantly below your projections. This could indicate a need to reassess your entry points...

ai_financial_summary_weekly.description: Returns AI summary with stats object for last 7 days
ai_financial_summary_weekly.ui_location: Profit Tracker page > 'AI Financial Summary' card with Weekly/Month toggle

ai_balance_forecast.description: Returns AI-powered balance projection with current_balance and ai_powered flag
ai_balance_forecast.ui_location: Profit Tracker page > 'AI Balance Forecast' card with 'Generate Forecast' button
ai_balance_forecast.ai_powered_flag: true when OpenRouter returns successfully, false for math fallback

ai_forum_summary.description: Returns AI summary for posts with 3+ comments, or reason for short threads
ai_forum_summary.ui_location: Forum Post page > 'AI Summary' button next to Comments header (only if 3+ comments)

ai_caching.description: Second call to same endpoint returns cached response (same content verified)
ai_caching.storage: MongoDB 'ai_cache' collection with cache_key hash and created_at TTL

verified: AI Coach button appears under each trade row
Button shows brain icon with 'AI Coach' text
Coaching text is personalized based on trade data and recent history
Summary includes bullet points with stats
Shows trade count, total profit, averages, commissions
AI Summary button only appears when comment_count >= 3
Posts with < 3 comments correctly hide the button
Backend returns reason: 'Thread too short for summary'
forum_ai_summary.note: No posts with 3+ comments in current test data - backend logic verified correct

openrouter_integration.test_result: All AI endpoints returned ai_powered=true confirming OpenRouter integration working
